sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72291" key="oi)ki/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκ-ίδιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐδ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72291.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οἰκεῖος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">domestic,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:473" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.473</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
